title: ID Analyzer AML Search Request
description: Request schema for the ID Analyzer /aml endpoint. Searches global sanctions lists, PEP databases, and watchlists.

name.description: Person or business name to search in AML databases.

idNumber.description: Document or ID number to search in AML databases.

entity.description: Entity type for the search subject.

country.description: Two-digit ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to narrow the search by nationality or country of origin.

database.description: Specific AML databases to search. Searches all available databases if omitted.

birthYear.description: Year of birth to narrow the search results.
